problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Small. Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site directly addresses this.
